journaling-companion.name: Journaling Companion
journaling-companion.description: Surprise photo prompts at random times — helps you stay mindful and lets the agent get to know you better.

sleeping-coach.name: Sleeping Coach
sleeping-coach.description: Sleep coaching powered by Oura Ring — morning reports and evening wind-down advice.

fitness-coach.name: Fitness Coach
fitness-coach.description: Sends workout schedule and collects post-training feedback.

daily-reflection.name: Daily Reflection
daily-reflection.description: End-of-day reflection — capture what mattered and set tomorrow's intentions.

tech-bro-digest.name: Tech Bro Digest
tech-bro-digest.description: Daily digest of tech news from configurable sources and topics.

personal-reminder.name: Personal Reminder
personal-reminder.description: Schedule one-time or recurring reminders delivered via message.

notetaker.name: Notetaker
notetaker.description: Capture thoughts, links, and ideas — get the most relevant one surfaced daily.

fabric.name: Fabric Memory
fabric.description: Portable AI memory powered by Fabric — proactive check-ins, memory retrieval, and user profiling.

waclaw.name: WhatsApp (waclaw)
waclaw.description: WhatsApp channel plugin via waclaw proxy — shared across dresses that need WhatsApp messaging.

buclaw.name: Browser (buclaw)
buclaw.description: Cloud browser via AI browser agent — connects OpenClaw to Browser Use for web browsing capabilities.

agentmail.name: Email (AgentMail)
agentmail.description: Email send/receive via AgentMail — gives OpenClaw its own email address.

clawdia.name: Clawdia
clawdia.description: Your personal concierge — helps you live your best life with warmth, initiative, and taste.
